description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9.4 Docker image with a cache of node_modules/. Include a before_script that runs npm install. Define a single stage called test. Add a test_proj job in the test stage that runs ./node_modules/.bin/ng lint and then ./node_modules/.bin/ng test --watch=false --code-coverage=true, stores the coverage/* directory as an artifact, extracts coverage percentage with the regex /(\d*.?\d+)%/, and runs on runners tagged linux.
